snapshot.title: Write arc-completion reward screen copy for each character
snapshot.description: When a player completes an arc they get a reward (Chips/Postcard). The reward screen needs character-specific copy: a closing line from that character + a flavour sentence about what they earned. 4 characters × 1–2 lines each. Keep it punchy and in-universe. ~1h.

acceptanceCriteria.text: 4 reward screen messages written (one per character)
Each has a character voice line + reward flavour text
Copy handed off or added to the relevant scene file
